customCSS: .meadow-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;overflow:hidden}.meadow-clouds{position:absolute;inset:0}.meadow-cloud1,.meadow-cloud2,.meadow-cloud3,.meadow-cloud4{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;opacity:0.45}.meadow-cloud1{width:350px;height:120px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(255,255,255,0.9),transparent 70%);top:8%;left:-5%;animation:meadow-drift1 80s linear infinite}.meadow-cloud2{width:280px;height:100px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(255,255,255,0.85),transparent 70%);top:15%;left:30%;animation:meadow-drift2 100s linear infinite}.meadow-cloud3{width:400px;height:140px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(255,255,255,0.9),transparent 70%);top:5%;left:60%;animation:meadow-drift3 90s linear infinite}.meadow-cloud4{width:300px;height:110px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(255,255,255,0.8),transparent 70%);top:20%;left:85%;animation:meadow-drift1 110s linear infinite}.meadow-dots{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(76,175,80,0.08) 1px,transparent 1px),radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,183,77,0.06) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:48px 48px,72px 72px;background-position:0 0,24px 24px;animation:meadow-sway 30s ease-in-out infinite alternate}.meadow-flowers{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:radial-gradient(3px 3px at 10% 90%,rgba(244,143,177,0.25),transparent),radial-gradient(3px 3px at 25% 85%,rgba(255,183,77,0.2),transparent),radial-gradient(2px 2px at 45% 92%,rgba(129,199,132,0.25),transparent),radial-gradient(3px 3px at 65% 88%,rgba(244,143,177,0.2),transparent),radial-gradient(2px 2px at 80% 93%,rgba(255,183,77,0.25),transparent),radial-gradient(3px 3px at 92% 87%,rgba(129,199,132,0.2),transparent);background-size:200% 200%;animation:meadow-bloom 60s linear infinite}@keyframes meadow-drift1{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(120vw)}}@keyframes meadow-drift2{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(110vw)}}@keyframes meadow-drift3{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(100vw)}}@keyframes meadow-sway{0%{background-position:0 0,24px 24px}100%{background-position:12px 6px,36px 30px}}@keyframes meadow-bloom{0%{background-position:0% 0%}100%{background-position:100% 100%}}
